name: iFlytek Workflow MCP Server
what_it_does: Official MCP server from iFlytek (iflytek org) — one of China's leading AI companies, known for voice AI and language technology. Enables AI agents to interact with iFlytek's workflow platform, triggering and managing AI-powered workflows, integrating with iFlytek's language models and AI services through their agentic workflow system.
use_cases: Triggering iFlytek AI workflow executions from orchestration agents
Integrating iFlytek's language and speech AI into MCP-based agent pipelines
Managing AI workflow states and results from process automation agents
Building hybrid workflows combining iFlytek AI services with other MCP tools
not_for: Teams not using iFlytek's platform (China-centric AI service)
Applications requiring English-first or non-Chinese AI services
Teams outside China without iFlytek account access
best_when: A developer or enterprise team using iFlytek's AI platform wants AI agents to interact with iFlytek's workflow system — particularly valuable for Chinese-language AI applications leveraging iFlytek's leading NLP capabilities.
avoid_when: You don't use iFlytek services. iFlytek is primarily a China-market AI company — their services and data infrastructure are China-centric. Consider data residency implications.

auth.notes: iFlytek API credentials required. Register at iFlytek developer platform (primarily in Chinese).

pricing.free_tier_limits: iFlytek provides free API credits on registration
pricing.paid_tiers: Usage-based pricing for API calls and workflow executions
pricing.notes: iFlytek developer account required. MCP server is free open source from iflytek org.

performance.rate_limits: iFlytek API rate limits by plan

known_agent_gotchas: DATA RESIDENCY: All data processed by iFlytek's cloud infrastructure in China — review for non-CN deployments
Documentation primarily in Chinese — international users may face language barriers
Official from iflytek org — quality MCP from a major Chinese AI company
iFlytek has strong Chinese language AI capabilities — particularly valuable for Chinese NLP tasks
agent_readiness.security_notes: Data processed by iFlytek in China. Chinese data residency. Official iFlytek implementation. HTTPS enforced. API key authentication.

security_score_components.security_notes: China data residency with iFlytek. Official implementation. HTTPS. API key authentication.
